justification: QR-ready payload and manual segmented payload decode into the same receipt export and verifier path.
Package ZIP remains required for public counted-inclusion verification.
Malformed channel payloads map to deterministic invalid_receipt results.
Focused component tests cover source-mode accessibility, package-required gating, and result category stability.
limitations: Camera scan is not claimed in v0.1.0.
True short-code lookup is out of scope.
Public consumed-right proof before finalization remains out of scope.
FEAT-152 does not itself lower production rollout or public/state claim blockers.
